name: Baklava (Low Fat Low Cal Version)
recipeInstructions:
This rich-tasting baklava contains half the amount of sugar and a fraction
of the fat you would normally use, thanks to reduced fats, sugar, and nuts.
The results will fool anyone.
1. Combine pistachio nuts, sugar, cinnamon, and rose water in a small bowl.
Using half of the filo sheets (cover the remaining with plastic wrap to prevent drying out), place 3 sheets in the bottom of a lightly greased 13x9 inches baking sheet. Brush some margarine on top. Sprinkle evenly with the nut mixture. Place the remaining sheets over the nut filling, brushing after every third sheet and the top sheet.
2. Cut the baklava into diamond shapes at 1-1/2 inches intervals. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes or until golden. Place on a wire rack to cool. Drizzle Rose Water Syrup evenly over the top and allow to soak several hours. Dot each diamond shape with whole cloves.
